title: Move mul() into its own module with a re-export

grade.command: node -e "Promise.all([import('./math.mjs'),import('./mul.mjs')]).then(([m,x])=>{if(m.add(2,3)!==5)throw new Error('add');if(m.mul(2,3)!==6)throw new Error('reexport');if(x.mul(4,5)!==20)throw new Error('mul');console.log('ok')})"
